body.p: i want to get back into the swing of coding but theres so many things i want to practice and so many things i want to get up and running and so many things i want to learn all at once and so many things i have to do and its making my back ache and i dont know where to begin

li.p: ive spent the past few months working on an npm project with an undefined name (informally called "booru abuse") and all the typescript bullshit has been pissing me off to an unfathomable extent

for example, recently the concept of "composition over inheritance" has taught me my code is fundamentally flawed and to un-flaw it i have to refactor a buttfuckton of classes and i just dont want to do that after everything
i also want to learn go and get in touch with devs of libpol so that i can be part of its development because i treasure libpol more than my life
i also want to completely revise this site (for the 20th time LAWL) and implement more indie web things like fun little widgets and stuff like that

this all PLUS my academics and grades (which are far down the shitter °ヮ°) are stressing me out to hell and back and my motivation is not at all boosted by the idea of iran obliterating us because some retard in charge of us all decided it would be a good idea in regards to nothing but his ego to launch a few bombs at their territory and declare victory in the "war" with no material benefit for the united states population

body.p: eventually, probably first and foremost, i'll revise this site along with my neocities and ill build up my reputation as the #1 zoologist lover again when i get a self-maintained booru set up for content of just her
long ass status necessary no apology intended. chiptumor OUT!
